tracks.rawText: 1:12Catalinav5.5Modern electro house at 128 BPM with punchy four-on-the-floor kick, sidechained 808 sub, snapped clap, and crisp open hats, Egyptian modal synth lead, qanun plucks, darbuka fills, and processed ney phrases weave through glossy saw stacks, filter automation, big build risers, and a wide stereo drop with tight metallic percussion1PublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 2:49Catalinav5.5Psychedelic rock in an ultra-whispered, low-volume mix: soft fingerpicked electric guitar through tape echo and spring reverb, brushed drums with mallets on toms, warm round bass, and drifting analog synth drones, Fuzz guitar appears only as a faint haze, with subtle phaser and slow Leslie rotation throughout1PublishRemix
